sections.paragraph:
- Original: πλείωνπλεῖονπλέον

- Transliteration: Pleion

- Phonetic: pli-own

- Definition:

1. greater in quantity

a. the more part, very many

2. greater in quality, superior, more excellent

- Origin: comparative of G4183

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Comparative of G4183; more in quantity number or quality; also (in plural) the major portion: - X above + exceed more excellent further (very) great (-er) long (-er) (very) many greater (more) part + yet but.
